name: Cemex — on-demand concrete delivery
description: The textbook Jobs-To-Be-Done reframing case from the late 1990s / early 2000s. Single BMC capturing how Cemex turned cement (a commodity with no differentiation) into a delivery-service business with a 20-minute on-site commitment. The interesting sticky concentration is in Channels + Customer Relationships + Key Activities (logistics + dispatch + GPS + driver-incentive). No BMG pattern tag — this case sits next to Patagonia, Carvana, and Cainiao in the library's 'interesting cases without a clean pattern fit' tier.
